title: Russian School Director Application Header — How to Write "To" and "From"
excerpt: How to write a school director application header in Russian: "Кому" in the dative case, "От кого" in the genitive case, common mistakes, and ready templates for parents.
content:
# Russian School Director Application Header — How to Write "To" and "From"

[Open the Addressee Generator →](/en/generator-adresata/?scenario=application&focus=to&source=article&article=school-director-application)

A Russian school director application is a formal letter from a parent or legal representative regarding school or administrative matters. The header follows strict business letter rules: recipient in the dative case, sender in the genitive case, and a right-aligned date.

## The Application Header

The header contains three required elements:

1. **"Кому"** (To) — the recipient (director)
2. **"От кого"** (From) — the sender (parent or representative)
3. **Date** — day, month, year

### Who Goes in the "To" Field

The "Кому" line is always in the dative case. For a school, this typically looks like:

- `Директору ГБОУ [number] [school name] [full name]`
- `Руководителю [institution name] [full name]`

Example:
```
Директору ГБОУ "School No. 47"
Smirnova Olga Nikolaevna
```

## Header Template

```
Директору ГБОУ "School No. 47"
Smirnova Olga Nikolaevna

From the parent of student in 2 "A" class
Ivanova Maria Sergeevna

                                          15 May 2026
```

## Common Mistakes

1. **Wrong grammatical case** — using "Директору" (dative) vs "Директора" (accusative). Always use dative: "Директору".
2. **Extra prepositions** — "На имя директора" instead of just "Директору".
3. **Informal school name** — "School" instead of the official institution name.

## Quick Checklist

- [ ] Header is centered
- [ ] "Кому" — dative case
- [ ] "От кого" — genitive case
- [ ] Date is right-aligned
- [ ] Text is free of errors

## Online Generator

To format a school director application header with correct cases — use the generator. Select the "School Director" scenario and the system will fill in the correct forms.

[Open the Generator →](/en/generator-adresata/?scenario=application&focus=to&source=article&article=school-director-application)

Note: Russian grammatical cases can be complex. The generator uses standard forms and example templates. For rare or unusual positions, verify the final result or consult a Russian grammar reference.
